{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "JavaScript Developer",
  "description": "Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment &amp; Selection, Performance management, Training &amp; Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: JavaScript Developer

Job Location: Remote

Job Summary:


	We are looking for a talented, smart and passionate Javascript developer (MERN fullstack) who will be responsible for all front and back-end platform-related duties, from developing designs to analyzing code.
	You will be responsible for developing and managing top-tier web applications.


Responsibilities


	Write, modify, and debug web applications using JavaScript, Node.js, HTML, and CSS.&middot;
	Design, code, and managewell organized,efficient, and flexible JavaScript code.
	Create new, user-centred using modern JavaScript frameworks.
	Develop new features, enhance existing features, and implement bug fixes for the code.
	Partner with design, back-end, and product teams to execute solutions.
	Address performance roadblocks and other challenges, enhancingapplications for speed and flexibility.
	Createand run automated tests to ensure code quality and functionality.
	Troubleshootand debug technical issues.
	Engagein code reviews and contributing ideas to optimizethe codebase.
	Ensureseamless connection of front-end elements with back-end services and APIs.
	Engage in Agile practices, including planning, daily check-ins and reviews.
	Createand implementnew features and functionalities.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or a related field.
	3+ years of experience with HTML / CSS / JavaScript, Node.js, React.js, MongoDB, and JavaScript frameworks.
	A strong understanding of programming concepts, algorithms, and data structures.
	Experience working with Agile development environment.
	Exceptional communication, organizational, and leadership skills.
	Knowledge of client-side single-page applications that use a modern framework such as React.js, Backbone, or Ruby.
	Excellent debugging and optimization skills.
	Unit/integration testing experience.


Renumeration
N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: cvs@odixcityconsulting.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

  },

JavaScript Developer Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: JavaScript Developer

Job Location: Remote

Job Summary:
     

            
    




	We are looking for a talented, smart and passionate Javascript developer (MERN fullstack) who will be responsible for all front and back-end platform-related duties, from developing designs to analyzing code.
	You will be responsible for developing and managing top-tier web applications.


Responsibilities


	Write, modify, and debug web applications using JavaScript, Node.js, HTML, and CSS.·
	Design, code, and managewell organized,efficient, and flexible JavaScript code.
	Create new, user-centred using modern JavaScript frameworks.
	Develop new features, enhance existing features, and implement bug fixes for the code.
	Partner with design, back-end, and product teams to execute solutions.
	Address performance roadblocks and other challenges, enhancingapplications for speed and flexibility.
	Createand run automated tests to ensure code quality and functionality.
	Troubleshootand debug technical issues.
	Engagein code reviews and contributing ideas to optimizethe codebase.
	Ensureseamless connection of front-end elements with back-end services and APIs.
	Engage in Agile practices, including planning, daily check-ins and reviews.
	Createand implementnew features and functionalities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or a related field.
	3+ years of experience with HTML / CSS / JavaScript, Node.js, React.js, MongoDB, and JavaScript frameworks.
	A strong understanding of programming concepts, algorithms, and data structures.
	Experience working with Agile development environment.
	Exceptional communication, organizational, and leadership skills.
	Knowledge of client-side single-page applications that use a modern framework such as React.js, Backbone, or Ruby.
	Excellent debugging and optimization skills.
	Unit/integration testing experience.


Renumeration
N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Van Sales Representative",
  "description": "Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service. As part of our expansion, we are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as a Van Sales Representative.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Van Sales Representative&nbsp;

Job Location: Shagamu, Ogun

Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Assist the sales team in identifying and reaching out to potential customers.
	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and in-person.
	Identify and generate new sales opportunities through networking, cold calling, and relationship building.
	Conduct sales presentations and product/service demonstrations to prospective clients.
	Understand customer needs and offer solutions that align with their goals.
	Build and maintain long-term relationships with clients to ensure repeat business.
	Meet or exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.
	Provide feedback and insights on market trends and customer preferences to the sales manager.
	Maintain accurate records of all sales activities and customer interactions.
	Results-driven with a passion for achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Self-motivated, with strong organizational and time management skills.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND or its equivalent.
	Must have a Valid Drivers License
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
	Proven experience as a Sales Representative or in a similar sales/customer service role.
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays if required.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to build rapport and establish strong relationships with clients.


Benefits


	Competitive salary.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
	Supportive team environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: applicantrecruiters@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

Van Sales Representative Job at Applicant Recruiters Limited




        
    

        
        Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service. As part of our expansion, we are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as a Van Sales Representative.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Van Sales Representative 

Job Location: Shagamu, Ogun

Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Assist the sales team in identifying and reaching out to potential customers.
	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and in-person.
	Identify and generate new sales opportunities through networking, cold calling, and relationship building.
	Conduct sales presentations and product/service demonstrations to prospective clients.
	Understand customer needs and offer solutions that align with their goals.
	Build and maintain long-term relationships with clients to ensure repeat business.
	Meet or exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.
	Provide feedback and insights on market trends and customer preferences to the sales manager.
	Maintain accurate records of all sales activities and customer interactions.
	Results-driven with a passion for achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Self-motivated, with strong organizational and time management skills.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND or its equivalent.
	Must have a Valid Drivers License
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
	Proven experience as a Sales Representative or in a similar sales/customer service role.
	Ability to  work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays if required.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to build rapport and establish strong relationships with clients.


Benefits


	Competitive salary.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
	Supportive team environment.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service / Admin Personnel

Job Location: Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Coordinate day-to-day office administration, including procurement of office supplies, vendor liaison, and facility management.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HSE Advisor",
  "description": "Selective Marine Oil &amp; Gas Limited is the Nigerian operating arm of the international Selective Marine Services group. Established in 1995, the company specializes in offshore drilling, rig management, equipment supply, and manpower sourcing for the global energy and marine sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Advisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a qualified and experienced HSE Advisor to join our Nigeria operations.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for promoting a strong safety culture and ensuring compliance with all Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) regulations and company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and enforce compliance with HSE policies, procedures, and industry standards.
	Conduct safety inspections, audits, and risk assessments.
	Facilitate toolbox talks, safety meetings, and HSE training sessions.
	Investigate incidents, accidents, and near misses, and prepare detailed reports.
	Ensure compliance with permit-to-work (PTW) systems and safe work practices.
	Monitor emergency preparedness and participate in emergency response drills.
	Advise management and workforce on HSE matters and promote continuous improvement.
	Maintain HSE documentation and prepare periodic reports.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or Diploma in a relevant discipline.
	3&ndash;5 years of offshore HSE experience in the oil &amp; gas or marine industry.
	NEBOSH IGC (mandatory); additional HSE certifications are an advantage.
	Good knowledge of international HSE standards and offshore safety regulations.
	Experience with PTW systems, risk assessments, incident investigations, and emergency response.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.
	Excellent command of written and spoken English.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: career@selectivemarine.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

HSE Advisor Job at Selective Marine Oil & Gas Limited




        
    

        
        Selective Marine Oil & Gas Limited is the Nigerian operating arm of the international Selective Marine Services group. Established in 1995, the company specializes in offshore drilling, rig management, equipment supply, and manpower sourcing for the global energy and marine sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Advisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	We are seeking a qualified and experienced HSE Advisor to join our Nigeria operations.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for promoting a strong safety culture and ensuring compliance with all Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) regulations and company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and enforce compliance with HSE policies, procedures, and industry standards.
	Conduct safety inspections, audits, and risk assessments.
	Facilitate toolbox talks, safety meetings, and HSE training sessions.
	Investigate incidents, accidents, and near misses, and prepare detailed reports.
	Ensure compliance with permit-to-work (PTW) systems and safe work practices.
	Monitor emergency preparedness and participate in emergency response drills.
	Advise management and workforce on HSE matters and promote continuous improvement.
	Maintain HSE documentation and prepare periodic reports.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or Diploma in a relevant discipline.
	3–5 years of offshore HSE experience in the oil & gas or marine industry.
	NEBOSH IGC (mandatory); additional HSE certifications are an advantage.
	Good knowledge of international HSE standards and offshore safety regulations.
	Experience with PTW systems, risk assessments, incident investigations, and emergency response.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.
	Excellent command of written and spoken English.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Feegor is an innovative B2B&nbsp;&nbsp;e-commerce company that enables retailers discover, connect, and source goods directly from manufacturers and major wholesalers nationwide. We are the technology backbone that ensures easy, trusted and efficient transactions in Nigeria&rsquo;s Informal retail sector.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Feegor is seeking a results-driven Business Development Manager to drive business growth through strategic partnerships, market expansion, and account management.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for acquiring and growing medium to large-scale business accounts, fostering key stakeholder relationships, and driving transaction volume and revenue across the platform.


Job Responsibilities


	Acquire, onboard, and partner with medium to large-scale businesses, positioning Feegor as a trusted long-term sourcing partner.
	Drive strategic partnerships with large-scale manufacturers and key stakeholders (e.g. distributors, logistics companies, banks, government agencies, hotels, and foundations) to support business and platform growth.
	Lead expansion into new markets and regions, identifying opportunities and executing market entry strategies.
	Own and grow assigned partner accounts to drive activation, repeat transactions, retention, and GMV/revenue targets.
	Collaborate and support cross-functionally with the Operations, Sales and other relevant teams to ensure seamless onboarding, fast first transactions, and effective execution of commercial initiatives.
	Maintain accurate pipelines, forecasts, and performance reports while supporting the CEO on strategic business initiatives as may be required.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in Business Development, Key Account Management, Sales, Partnerships, or a related commercial role.
	Proven track record of acquiring and managing medium to large-scale business accounts.
	Strong negotiation, relationship management, and stakeholder engagement skills.
	Experience developing strategic partnerships and driving revenue growth.
	Experience within e-commerce, wholesale distribution, supply chain, procurement, or B2B marketplaces will be an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: contact@feegor.com using &quot;Business Development Manager&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Business Development Manager Job at Feegor




        
    

        
        Feegor is an innovative B2B  e-commerce company that enables retailers discover, connect, and source goods directly from manufacturers and major wholesalers nationwide. We are the technology backbone that ensures easy, trusted and efficient transactions in Nigeria’s Informal retail sector. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	Feegor is seeking a results-driven Business Development Manager to drive business growth through strategic partnerships, market expansion, and account management.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for acquiring and growing medium to large-scale business accounts, fostering key stakeholder relationships, and driving transaction volume and revenue across the platform.


Job Responsibilities


	Acquire, onboard, and partner with medium to large-scale businesses, positioning Feegor as a trusted long-term sourcing partner.
	Drive strategic partnerships with large-scale manufacturers and key stakeholders (e.g. distributors, logistics companies, banks, government agencies, hotels, and foundations) to support business and platform growth.
	Lead expansion into new markets and regions, identifying opportunities and executing market entry strategies.
	Own and grow assigned partner accounts to drive activation, repeat transactions, retention, and GMV/revenue targets.
	Collaborate and support cross-functionally with the Operations, Sales and other relevant teams to ensure seamless onboarding, fast first transactions, and effective execution of commercial initiatives.
	Maintain accurate pipelines, forecasts, and performance reports while supporting the CEO on strategic business initiatives as may be required.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in Business Development, Key Account Management, Sales, Partnerships, or a related commercial role.
	Proven track record of acquiring and managing medium to large-scale business accounts.
	Strong negotiation, relationship management, and stakeholder engagement skills.
	Experience developing strategic partnerships and driving revenue growth.
	Experience within e-commerce, wholesale distribution, supply chain, procurement, or B2B marketplaces will be an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Business Development Manager" as the subject of the mail.
